ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Aldus Romanus omnibus una cum græcis literis, sanctos etiam mores discere cupientibus.
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: S. P. D. Gregorii episcopi Nazanzeni carmina ... nuper e greco in latinum ad verbum fere tralata.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
